CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Data freshness is more than 24 hours old
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not processed data from the previous day. Stale data will lead to incorrect financial reports.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data pipeline issue immediately to ensure data freshness.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: The data quality has fallen below the required threshold, leading to potential erroneous financial insights.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and correct the data quality issues to meet the SLO.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the range of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected bounds, which may indicate a significant variance in transaction volume.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Verify the transaction volume and investigate any anomalies in the data.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: The pipeline runtime is nearing the 120-minute limit, which may delay data availability for the morning dashboard.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary to meet the SLO.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: The data quality is slightly below the required threshold, which may lead to minor financial insights inaccuracies.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the data quality issues and take corrective actions if needed.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, which may indicate a significant issue.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the failure rate spike and address the issue promptly.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data. This is an informational alert only.
INFO.recommended_action: No immediate action required, but monitor for any potential issues.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25, but within the acceptable range.
INFO.recommended_action: No immediate action required, but keep an eye on the row count for any significant deviations.
